title: Admin order list & detail view
description: Admin order list with filtering (status, date range, search) and order detail view with customer info, items, and payment.

inScope: Order list with filtering by status, date range, and search
Order detail view showing customer info, items, and payment
Served via Route Handlers (HTTP) for the admin's TanStack Query layer

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can filter the order list by status and date range
Admin can open an order and see customer info, line items, and payment details
